title: Section 35
content: 1[35. Annual report.--(1) The annual report of the University shall be prepared under the directions of the Karma-Samiti (Executive Council) which shall include, among other matters, the steps taken by the University to promote socially relevant research in physical and social sciences, weaker sections' need oriented extension activities and integration of the community life of the University with that of the wider world. (2) The annual report so prepared shall be submitted to the Samsad (Court) on or before such date as may be prescribed by the Statutes and shall be considered by the Samsad (Court) in its annual meeting. (3) The Samsad (Court) may communicate its comments on the annual report to the Karma-Samiti (Executive Council) and the Paridarsaka (Visitor). (4) A copy of the annual report, as prepared under sub-section (1) shall also be submitted to the Central Government which shall, as soon as may be, cause the same to be laid before both the Houses of Parliament.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s.22, ibid., for sections 35 and 36 (w.e.f. 8-8-1984).
